Stroke/Transient Ischemic 
Attack 3.9% 6.6% 2.7% 68% • Added/removed DX codes

* We have ordered this table by the condition’s name within the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions file. 
** We calculate the change in prevalence as the 30 CCW % minus 27 CCW %. 
† We calculate the % change in identified beneficiaries as (30 CCW minus 27 CCW)
